models.MarketplaceBounty: A Live bounty visible to participants, including title, description, reward, organization, dates, and capacity limits.
models.Organization: The business that posted the bounty, shown as context on bounty cards and detail pages.
models.Category: A label grouping bounties by type (e.g., Social Media, Content Writing, Design).
models.UserSubmission: A lightweight record of the current user's submission for a bounty, used to show status on the detail page instead of the submit CTA.

relationships: MarketplaceBounty belongs to an Organization (the poster)
UserSubmission belongs to a MarketplaceBounty (one per user per bounty)

bounties.title: Share Our Product Launch on Twitter/X
bounties.shortDescription: Retweet our launch post with a genuine comment about why you're excited. Must have 100+ followers.
bounties.fullDescription:
We're launching AcmeLabs v2 and want real people sharing the news. Retweet our pinned launch post from @AcmeLabsHQ with a quote tweet that includes your honest take on why you're excited about the product. Screenshots of engagement metrics are required as proof.

Your tweet must:
- Be a quote retweet (not a plain retweet)
- Include at least 2 sentences of genuine commentary
- Stay live for at least 7 days after posting
bounties.eligibilityText: Must have a Twitter/X account with at least 100 followers. Account must be at least 6 months old.

bounties.title: Write a 500-Word Blog Review of Our SaaS Platform
bounties.shortDescription: Write and publish an honest review on your blog or Medium. Must include pros, cons, and a comparison.
bounties.fullDescription:
We want authentic, detailed reviews from real users. Write a blog post of at least 500 words reviewing AcmeLabs after using it for at least one week. Your review should cover:

1. **Onboarding experience** — How easy was it to get started?
2. **Core features** — What worked well? What didn't?
3. **Comparison** — How does it stack up against one competitor you've used?
4. **Verdict** — Would you recommend it, and to whom?

Publish on your personal blog, Medium, or Dev.to. The post must remain live for at least 30 days.
bounties.eligibilityText: Open to anyone with a blog that receives at least 100 monthly visitors. Self-hosted blogs, Medium, and Dev.to are all accepted.

bounties.title: Complete Our Product-Market Fit Survey
bounties.shortDescription: Take a 5-minute survey about your experience with project management tools. Screenshot the completion page.
bounties.fullDescription:
Help us understand how project management tools are used in the wild. This is a 5-minute Google Forms survey covering:

- Your current PM tool stack
- Pain points with existing solutions
- Feature priorities for your next tool
- Team size and workflow preferences

Screenshot the completion confirmation page as proof.
bounties.eligibilityText: Anyone who currently uses a project management tool professionally.

bounties.title: Design 3 Instagram Story Templates for Our Brand
bounties.shortDescription: Create three on-brand Story templates in Figma using our brand colors and guidelines.
bounties.fullDescription:
We need three Instagram Story templates for our ongoing social media campaigns. Each template should serve a different purpose:

1. **Product Announcement** — For launching new features
2. **Customer Testimonial** — For sharing quotes from happy users
3. **Tips & Tricks** — For educational content with numbered lists

Brand colors: #E91E63 (pink), #1E88E5 (blue), #FFFFFF (white)
Font: Inter for body, Space Grotesk for headlines

Deliver as a shared Figma file link. Include preview image exports.
bounties.eligibilityText: Must have a Figma portfolio with at least 3 completed design projects.

bounties.title: Refer 5 Qualified Leads to Our Sales Team
bounties.shortDescription: Introduce us to 5 companies that could benefit from our platform. Warm intros via email required.
bounties.fullDescription:
Help us grow by connecting us with companies that need a better project management solution. We're looking for warm introductions (not cold lists) to decision-makers at companies with 50+ employees.

For each referral, provide:
- Company name and size
- Contact name, title, and email
- A brief note on why they'd be a good fit
- Screenshot of your introduction email

All 5 referrals must be submitted together in one submission.
bounties.eligibilityText: Open to anyone with a professional network in the tech or SaaS space. Referrals must be unique — no duplicates with other participants.

bounties.title: Record a 2-Minute Video Testimonial
bounties.shortDescription: Share your experience with NovaTech in a short video testimonial. Authentic, unscripted preferred.
bounties.fullDescription:
We'd love to hear your story! Record a 2-minute (max) video testimonial about your experience using NovaTech's analytics platform. Keep it authentic and unscripted — we want your real thoughts.

Guidelines:
- 1–2 minutes long
- Good lighting and clear audio
- Mention at least one specific feature you love
- Upload to YouTube (unlisted is fine) or Google Drive
- Horizontal orientation preferred
bounties.eligibilityText: Must be a current or past NovaTech user with at least 30 days of usage.

bounties.title: Beta Test Our Mobile App and Report Bugs
bounties.shortDescription: Install our beta app, test core workflows, and report any bugs you find with screenshots.
bounties.fullDescription:
We're launching a mobile app and need real-world testing before going live. Install our TestFlight/Play Store beta build and test the following workflows:

1. Sign up and onboarding
2. Create a project and add 3 tasks
3. Invite a team member
4. Use the Kanban view to move tasks
5. Export a report

For each bug found, document:
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected vs. actual behavior
- Screenshot or screen recording
- Device model and OS version

Minimum 3 bugs to qualify. Submit all findings in one submission.
bounties.eligibilityText: iOS 16+ or Android 13+ required. Must complete all 5 test workflows.

bounties.title: Create a TikTok Explainer About Our Product
bounties.shortDescription: Make a 30–60 second TikTok explaining what Bloom Studio does in a fun, engaging way.
bounties.fullDescription:
We want creative TikTok content that explains Bloom Studio's design collaboration platform to a non-technical audience. Your video should:

- Be 30–60 seconds long
- Use trending audio or your own voiceover
- Clearly explain what Bloom Studio does and who it's for
- Include our handle @bloomstudio in the caption
- Stay live for at least 14 days

Bonus points for humor, storytelling, or creative editing. We're looking for authenticity over production value.
bounties.eligibilityText: Must have a TikTok account with at least 500 followers.
